rationale: First's finding on Deck.lean:73 is real (the `simp [...]` proof in fiberHomeomorph relies on `eq_comm` + default simp-set providing `Set.mem_singleton_iff` after `map_proj`; confirmed verbatim in the diff) and improves proof-quality by forcing an explicit `simp only` or direct proof, whereas second's approve leaves the brittleness untouched.
